a: Google Podcasts (if available in your region)

c.d: Cleanliness and intuitiveness of the app's design, impacting ease of navigation and overall user experience.
c.s: User reviews, app store descriptions, expert reviews

c.d: Effectiveness of search and recommendation tools for finding new podcasts based on user preferences and listening history.
c.s: App reviews, personal testing, feature lists

c.d: Flexibility in controlling playback, including features like speed adjustment, offline listening, sleep timers, and skip intro options.
c.s: App descriptions, feature lists, user reviews

c.d: Seamless syncing and accessibility across multiple devices (iOS, Android, web, desktop).
c.s: App specifications, user reviews, expert reviews

c.d: Breadth and depth of available podcasts, including access to exclusive content or original shows.
The ability to download episodes for listening without an internet connection.
Availability of a subscription or premium version that removes advertisements.
Options to customize the app's appearance and behavior, such as themes, playlist creation, and queue management.
Cost of the app, including whether it is free, subscription-based, or offers in-app purchases.
c.s: App store pricing, in-app purchase information

c.d: Quality of audio streaming and playback.
